title: polygala chinensis var. stenosepala
intro: Polygala chinensis var. stenosepala, also known as Yuan Zhi, is a variety of the Polygala chinensis plant, which belongs to the Polygalaceae family. Traditionally, Polygala chinensis var. stenosepala is used in Chinese medicine and is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as improving sleep quality, reducing stress and anxiety, and alleviating symptoms of insomnia and neurodegenerative diseases. In traditional herbal preparations, Polygala chinensis var. stenosepala is often combined with other herbs and used as a decoction or tea to harness its medicinal properties.
